description: Mattermost is open at the login screen in the web browser. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Navigate to the 'Engineering' channel in the 'Main Team' workspace. Set the channel header to: 'Sprint 24 | Stand-up: 10 AM ET daily | Retro: Fridays 3 PM ET | On-call: @agent.user'. The header should be visible at the top of the channel after saving.

metadata.expected_header: Sprint 24 | Stand-up: 10 AM ET daily | Retro: Fridays 3 PM ET | On-call: @agent.user
